task_completion.description: Agent actively uses Wireshark to analyze the packet capture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with Wireshark, such as applying display filters (e.g., 'http', 'tcp.port == 9443'), inspecting packet details, or following TCP/HTTP streams.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the incident report file with the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or terminal shows the file `/home/ga/Documents/incident_report.txt` being edited, containing the required 'INCIDENT REPORT' header and the specified fields.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct IPs and failed login count.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The incident report text explicitly contains 'ATTACKER_IP: 10.13.37.50', 'WEBSERVER_IP: 10.13.37.20', and 'FAILED_LOGINS: 20'.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct valid credentials and webshell filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The incident report text explicitly contains 'VALID_CREDENTIALS: admin:S3cur3P@ss2024' and 'WEBSHELL_FILENAME: cmd.php'.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct executed commands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The incident report text explicitly contains 'COMMANDS_EXECUTED: id,uname -a,cat /etc/passwd,ls -la /opt/data'.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct exfiltration server IP and bytes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The incident report text explicitly contains 'EXFIL_SERVER_IP: 10.13.37.100' and 'EXFIL_BYTES: 16350'.

integrity.description: The agent derived the answers by interacting with Wireshark (or tshark) to inspect the PCAP.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent genuinely exploring the PCAP file in Wireshark or via terminal commands, rather than magically knowing the answers or reading them from unauthorized ground truth files.

integrity.description: The agent manually writes or echoes the findings into the report file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or pasting the discovered values into the text editor or using standard terminal commands (like echo or cat) to construct the file, rather than running a pre-existing script.

integrity.description: The report is saved to the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar, save dialog, or terminal commands confirm the file is specifically located at `/home/ga/Documents/incident_report.txt`.
